author: Bortlesboat
name: 10L + PPM Full-Rescore Order-12 N-gram + Leave-One-Out
blurb: 10L d=512 GQA. PPM-style all-order blend (orders 2-12) with escape probabilities instead of hard backoff. Decoupled two-pass: pass 1 stores per-token model probabilities, pass 2 rescores ALL tokens against full cache with leave-one-out self-exclusion. Mean of 3 seeds.
